title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 63. ELECTRONIC DISSEMINATION OF COMMERCIAL

RECORDINGS OR AUDIOVISUAL WORKS

§3231. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana True Origin of Digital Goods Act".

            Acts 2022, No. 267, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 63. ELECTRONIC DISSEMINATION OF COMMERCIAL
RECORDINGS OR AUDIOVISUAL WORKS
§3231.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana True Origin of
Digital Goods Act".
Acts 2022, No. 267, §1.
